backend/main.mo: Actor manages user profiles with access control and handles public contact inquiries with admin-only retrieval features.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking a logo-replacement task to affected frontend files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: List of summarized descriptions for various frontend files including pages, components, hooks, and configuration.
frontend/DOMAIN_SETUP.md: Guide explaining how to connect escoffiers.com to an Internet Computer frontend canister using DNS setup.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining OKLCH color tokens, dark mode variables, and global layout styling.
frontend/index.html: Main HTML entry file setting branding metadata, favicons, SEO tags, fonts, and root script mount.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with layout, routes for all pages, and protected admin inquiries route.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminNavLi: Conditional Admin navigation link shown only to authenticated users, with mobile and desktop variants.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Authentication button handling Internet Identity login/logout with loading and error handling states.
frontend/src/components/auth/RequireAuth: Route guard that shows a sign‑in prompt unless the user is authenticated, otherwise renders children.
frontend/src/components/contact/ContactD: Contact details sidebar showing location, email, business hours, and response-time notice.
frontend/src/components/contact/ContactF: React contact form that manages input state, validates required fields, and submits inquiries via useSubmitInquiry.
frontend/src/components/site/BrandLogo.t: Displays brand logo or wordmark with size and variant options, optionally wrapped in a link.
frontend/src/components/site/Container.t: A layout wrapper providing consistent max-width and padding using Tailwind classes.
frontend/src/components/site/Footer.tsx: Footer with branding, quick links, contact info, and a dynamic copyright section.
frontend/src/components/site/Header.tsx: Site header with responsive navigation, branding, login, and admin links using a mobile sheet menu.
frontend/src/components/site/Section.tsx: Generic section wrapper adding vertical padding and optional class overrides.
frontend/src/config/branding.ts: Central branding config defining logo, wordmark, favicon, social images, and company names.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook creating and managing an authenticated or anonymous backend actor, refetching dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInquiries.ts: Hooks to fetch all inquiries or a single inquiry from the backend using the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context and provider managing Internet Identity authentication, login state, and stored identities.
frontend/src/hooks/usePageMeta.ts: Hook that updates document title and meta tags for SEO and social sharing.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubmitInquiry.ts: React Query mutation hook that submits an inquiry through an actor and shows success or error toasts.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining light and dark theme variables and base styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point initializing React Query, Internet Identity provider, and rendering the root component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page providing company background, mission, vision, and service overview.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Inquiries.tsx: Admin page displaying all contact inquiries, with loading/error states and a dialog to view inquiry details. Uses hooks to fetch inquiries and renders them in a table.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with an inquiry form and success message state handling.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Homepage with hero section, company intro, and key feature highlights linking to services and contact pages.
frontend/src/pages/Recruitment.tsx: Recruitment services page detailing domestic and international hiring and related offerings.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Services page listing consulting offerings with descriptions and themed UI cards.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters and session-based persisted parameters. Supports both query strings and hash-based routing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending colors, fonts, animations, and container settings. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking logo-reversion work, known issues, and pending feature requests. Defines current project versioning and requirements.
